summary: Mehfil rebrand E2E regression complete. Backend: NEW test file /app/backend/tests/test_mehfil.py — 14/14 PASS in 10.8s (guest auth, menu CRUD, inventory CRUD, image upload + serve via /api/uploads, TTS audio, transcribe empty-input error). Pre-existing /app/backend/tests/test_smartdine.py — 29/29 still PASS. Frontend: Customer flow on /auth/login → guest tab default → Continue as Guest (empty payload) → /customer/menu loads 27 menu items across 8 chapters (sidebar + sections). Search filter ("biryani") narrows to 4 items. Flip card details + add-from-back works, floating cart pill appears with toast. AI Waiter dock opens, 3 mode tabs render (Explore/Chat/Talk-key=voice), TTS toggle clickable, Chat sends message and AI streams a response (>50 chars). Explore tab lists items and add button works. Voice/Talk tab renders ai-voice-start mic button. Staff tab pre-fills owner@smartdine.ai/Owner@123 → login-submit → /admin. Admin Menu CRUD via sidebar nav: Add dish → appears in grid, Edit price → reflected, Delete via confirm dialog → removed. Admin Inventory page reachable; add-inv-btn opens modal (specific inv-* testid validation deferred; backend CRUD already green).

integration_issues.flow: Direct deep-link navigation to /admin/* immediately after login
integration_issues.issue: Calling page.goto('/admin/menu') in tests right after wait_for_url('**/admin**') redirects back to /auth/login with ?next=/admin/menu. Zustand persist ('sd-session') hasn't yet hydrated to localStorage when RoleGuard runs. In-app sidebar link navigation works fine. Real users won't hit this, but bookmark/reload of an admin URL might if hydration races. Recommend: gate RoleGuard redirect until persist rehydration completes (hasHydrated flag).

action_items: (Optional, low-priority) Fix RoleGuard hydration race: when admin URL is loaded directly before Zustand persist rehydrates, user is bounced to /auth/login. Easy fix: in RoleGuard, wait for `useAuthStore.persist.hasHydrated()` before redirecting.

(Note, not a bug) AI Waiter 'Talk' tab key is 'voice' (testid ai-mode-voice) — review_request mentioned 'Talk' label which matches the UI; the data-testid suffix 'voice' is fine but worth documenting.
critical_code_review_comments: Image upload endpoint correctly validates MIME-by-extension, enforces 5MB ceiling, rejects empty files, and serves uploads back via StaticFiles mount at /api/uploads/.
POST /api/auth/guest is idempotent, generates per-call guest_id, returns role=customer JWT that immediately validates via /api/auth/me.
Menu/Inventory CRUD endpoints properly gated by require_roles('admin'); PATCH strips 'id' and '_id' from payload — safe.
TTS endpoint emergentintegrations OpenAITextToSpeech responded in ~3-4s with proper audio/mpeg content-type and ~30KB mp3 payload for short text.
Customer menu page reads /api/menu via 8s polling — verified live (27 items render). Admin Add dish reflects on customer side within polling window in iteration_4-style flow.
Pre-existing minor: AI Waiter dock 'Talk' tab uses internal key 'voice'; tests must use [data-testid="ai-mode-voice"] not 'ai-mode-talk'.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all critical flows green; admin inventory full-modal CRUD not exhaustively driven — backend covered, page reachable, add-inv-btn opens modal)

test_credentials: owner@smartdine.ai/Owner@123 (admin). Customer = Continue as Guest (no creds needed).
seed_data_creation: Created/deleted ephemeral TEST_Mehfil_<ts> dish, TEST_Saffron inventory, TEST_Mehfil_Kebab menu item — all cleaned up by their own tests. Several guest_* documents in db.guests collection from /api/auth/guest tests (harmless; safe to leave or sweep with prefix 'TEST_').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two pytest suites cover the backend: test_smartdine.py (29 tests, original SmartDine flows) + test_mehfil.py (14 tests, Mehfil rebrand endpoints). Run both: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/results.xml`. Frontend: when testing admin pages, navigate via in-app sidebar links AFTER login (not direct page.goto) to avoid the RoleGuard hydration race. AI Waiter Talk tab testid is ai-mode-voice (not ai-mode-talk). Image-upload backend test uses a pure-python generated 1x1 PNG — pattern is reusable.
rca of the issue: Auth hydration race (low priority): Zustand-persist for 'sd-session' uses an async storage rehydration. RoleGuard mounts on /admin/* and checks `useAuthStore.getState().user?.role !== 'admin'` before persist has restored state from localStorage, so it redirects to /auth/login?next=…. Mitigation: gate RoleGuard's redirect behind `useAuthStore.persist.hasHydrated()`. Workaround during testing: navigate via sidebar links after successful login. All other tested flows are clean and functional.
